description: Create a channel named 'Census_Upsert_Processor' to synchronize patient admission data. The channel must accept JSON data (e.g., {"mrn": "M123", "name": "John Doe", "location": "ICU-01"}) via an HTTP Listener on port 6665 and use a JavaScript Writer to perform a conditional 'upsert' (Insert if new, Update if exists) into the 'current_census' table in the PostgreSQL database (jdbc:postgresql://nextgen-postgres:5432/mirthdb, user/pass: postgres/postgres). The logic should update or insert the 'mrn', 'patient_name', 'location', and 'last_updated' (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) columns while managing the database connection properly. Access the system via the REST API (https://localhost:8443/api) or Web Dashboard (https://localhost:8443) using credentials admin/admin.
